message:
feat(indexer): streaming lexical rebuild equivalence evidence (ibuuh.29)

Wire an in-process equivalence accumulator into the authoritative serial
lexical rebuild pipeline so it emits a diffable proof against prior
behavior without buffering the whole corpus.

New types in src/indexer/mod.rs:
- LexicalRebuildEquivalenceEvidence { document_count, manifest_fingerprint,
  golden_query_digest, golden_query_hit_counts }  (pub(crate), Serialize)
- LexicalRebuildEquivalenceAccumulator that absorbs each prepared packet
  and its prebuilt docs through a streaming blake3 hasher, plus per-probe
  sub-hashers for golden-query hits. Default probes: error, TODO,
  function, import, test.

Integration points in the non-staged streaming consumer
(rebuild_tantivy_from_db_with_options):
- Instantiate the accumulator before the pipeline loop.
- Absorb each packet before finish_conversation!, covering every
  document the writer ingests.
- On successful rebuild, finalize and emit
  'lexical rebuild authoritative equivalence evidence' at INFO with
  document_count, manifest_fingerprint, golden_query_digest,
  golden_probe_count, golden_query_hit_total, indexed_docs,
  total_conversations, processed_conversations.
- Persist the evidence to
  <index>/.lexical-rebuild-equivalence.json atomically so a later run
  (or external diff) can compare fingerprints without replaying.
- Extend LexicalRebuildOutcome with
  Option<LexicalRebuildEquivalenceEvidence>; the staged-shards path and
  the already-completed short-circuit return None.

Tests (src/indexer/mod.rs, cfg(test)):
- rebuild_tantivy_from_db_emits_equivalence_evidence: drives the real
  rebuild_tantivy_from_db entrypoint against the lexical fixture,
  asserts evidence fields (doc_count, fingerprint length, probe list
  identity), round-trips the persisted JSON ledger through the
  production type, and asserts the INFO log surface.
- lexical_rebuild_equivalence_accumulator_matches_legacy_and_keyset_replays:
  streams the accumulator over the legacy OFFSET and keyset-batched
  replays of the same fixture and asserts byte-identical evidence.
- lexical_rebuild_equivalence_accumulator_counts_probe_hits_and_hashes_are_stable:
  asserts deterministic per-probe hit counts, digest stability across
  invocations, and that probe order participates in the digest.

The existing keyset_batched_lexical_rebuild_matches_legacy_offset_replay_evidence
test keeps its JSON-artifact check; the new accumulator path is a
streaming-friendly sibling proof, not a replacement.

Validation (local, before concurrent agent edits to src/indexer/semantic.rs):
- cargo check --all-targets (clean)
- cargo fmt --check (clean)
- cargo test --lib rebuild_tantivy_from_db_emits_equivalence_evidence
- cargo test --lib lexical_rebuild_equivalence_accumulator_matches_legacy_and_keyset_replays
- cargo test --lib lexical_rebuild_equivalence_accumulator_counts_probe_hits_and_hashes_are_stable
- cargo test --lib keyset_batched_lexical_rebuild_matches_legacy_offset_replay_evidence
- cargo test --lib rebuild_tantivy_from_db_  (all 15 pass)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
